   examine witnesses; it could apply torture. It was abolished by the Long
   Parliament in 1641.

n a situation in golf where an opponent's ball blocks the line between your ball and the hole
n a thwarting and distressing situation

styphnate.d: n. A salt of styphnic acid.

stypsis.d: n the ability to contract or draw together soft body tissues to check blood flow or restrict secretion of fluids

a. 收敛性的, 止血的
n. 止血剂
styptic.d: s. tending to check bleeding by contracting the tissues or blood vessels

stypticine.t: [化] 止血素; 盐酸可他宁

stypticity.t: n. 止血作用, 收敛性
stypticity.d: n. The quality or state of being styptic; astringency.

styptol.t: 止血醇, 二苯二甲酸可他宁(商品名)

styptysate.t: [医] 止血荠(止血用荠菜制剂)

stypven.t: [医] 斯提普文(从一种毒蛇的毒汁制得的止血剂)

styracaceae.d: n a widely distributed family of shrubs and trees of order Ebenales

styracin.d:
n. A white crystalline tasteless substance extracted from
   gum storax, and consisting of a salt of cinnamic acid with cinnamic
   alcohol.

styracol.t: 苏合香脑, (肉)桂酸愈疮木酯

styracosaurus.t: [网络] 戟龙；戟龙属；刺盾角龙

styrafil.t: 玻璃纤维增强聚苯乙烯

styramate.t: [化] 司替氨酯; 氨甲酸-2-羟基-2-苯基乙酯

styrax.d: n any shrub or small tree of the genus Styrax having fragrant bell-shaped flowers that hang below the dark green foliage

styrax liquidus.t: [医] 液状苏合香, 流动苏合香

styrenated alkyd.t: [化] 苯乙烯改性醇酸树脂

styrene.t:
n. 苯乙烯
[化] 苯乙烯; 苏合香烯; 苯亚乙基

styrene resin.t: [医] 苯乙烯树脂, 聚苯乙烯

styrene-butadiene block copolymer.t: [化] 苯乙烯-丁二烯嵌段共聚物; K树脂

styrene-cis-butenedioic anhydride copoly.t: [化] 苯乙烯-顺丁烯二酸酐共聚物

styrene-dichlorostyrene copolymer.t: [化] 苯乙烯-二氯苯乙烯共聚物

styrene-divinylbenzene copolymer.t: [化] 苯乙烯-二乙烯苯共聚物

styrene-maleic anhydride copolymer.t: [化] 苯乙烯-顺丁烯二酸酐共聚物

styria.t: n. 施第里尔（奥地利东南部的州）

styrofoam.d: n. a light resilient foam of polystyrene

styrolene.d:
n. An unsaturated hydrocarbon, C8H8, obtained by the
   distillation of storax, by the decomposition of cinnamic acid, and by
   the condensation of acetylene, as a fragrant, aromatic, mobile liquid;
   -- called also phenyl ethylene, vinyl benzene, styrol, styrene, and
   cinnamene.

styron.t: n. 肉桂塑料(一种抗蚀性聚苯乙烯塑料)
styron.d: n United States writer best known for his novels (born in 1925)

styrone.t:
[化] 肉桂醇
[医] 肉桂醇, 苯丙烯醇, 桂酰醇
styrone.d:
n. A white crystalline substance having a sweet taste and a
   hyacinthlike odor, obtained by the decomposition of styracin; --
   properly called cinnamic, / styryl, alcohol.

styryl.d:
n. A hypothetical radical found in certain derivatives of
   styrolene and cinnamic acid; -- called also cinnyl, or cinnamyl.

stys.t: n. （网络用语） Speak To You Soon （马上就和你说）

styx.d: n. (Greek mythology) a river in Hades across which Charon carried dead souls
